arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola makes telling 'ex-captain' Kyle Walker point as he defends Rico Lewis

arts.ttl: Man City vs Brighton: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Man City host Brighton in the Premier League on Saturday. Preview includes team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: Ederson: New arrivals have given us a huge boost
arts.sum: With four new signings plus the arrival of Claudio Echeverri, the Brazilian keeper believes the quintet of players has been a huge plus at a crucial part of the season. “Nico as well, he arrived to help in a position that we needed a lot, possibly the most important position in our team, having a player like that both in terms of creation and defensively.

arts.ttl: Evolution of the Premier League has been massive, says Guardiola
arts.sum: Ahead of Saturday’s visit of Brighton, who are also chasing Champions League football next season, Guardiola shared his belief that teams across the division have improved in that timeframe. It’s good for the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel insists Jack Grealish’s England omission is due to lack of minutes
arts.sum: The 29-year-old was a high-profile omission for March’s World Cup qualifiers against Albania and Latvia.

arts.ttl: Reports Man City considering Juventus’s Di Gregorio to replace Ederson
arts.sum: Juventus goalkeeper Michele Di Gregorio is reportedly a candidate to replace fan-favourite Ederson at Manchester...

arts.ttl: Jack Grealish's private confession to England boss Thomas Tuchel over current issues
arts.sum: New England boss Thomas Tuchel handed Marcus Rashford and Jordan Henderson Three Lions recalls and named Newcastle's veteran defender Dan Burn in his squad, but had no place for the £100million Manchester City star

arts.ttl: 'Not about that' - Pep Guardiola unconvinced by Man City transfer changes

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel: Jack Grealish can be the glue in my England team but he needs rhythm
